name: ASRock B550M PHANTOM GAMING 4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - HDMI - DisplayPort - Realtek GbE LAN

description: ASRock B550M PHANTOM GAMING 4 micro ATX motherboard with Phantom Gaming design and PCIe 4.0.
